title: Smoky Paella with Minari and Fideua
description: Hearty Spanish paella dish featuring smoky sausage, wholesome vegetables, and a twist of minari and fideua.

ingredients.name: wholesome vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add smoky sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add wholesome vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add minari and fideua, and stir to combine.
Add chicken broth, water, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
